shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive hover state for navigation cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Close/confirm actions. Orange background with white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff3e00; color: #fff; width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Card
components.description: White card surface for grade data and content sections.

components.name: Exam Card
components.description: Navigation card for exam access, rendered on gradient parent.
components.css: .ds-exam-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-exam-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.02); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-exam-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; } .ds-exam-label { flex: 1; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; } .ds-exam-arrow { font-size: 1.1rem; transition: transform 0.3s; } .ds-exam-card:hover .ds-exam-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Input Search
components.description: Search input used on the Enlaces de Consulta page.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { position: relative; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 1rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); font-size: 1rem; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.85rem 1rem 0.85rem 2.8rem; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.9rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #fff; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); outline: none; transition: all 0.35s ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59,130,246,0.2), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transform: scale(1.01); }

components.name: Tag Badge
components.description: Category tag chip on link cards.
components.css: .ds-tag { padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }

narrative.overview: A functional, clear educational platform designed for students and coordinators. The aesthetic prioritizes readability, data clarity, and trust over decoration. The interface uses blue as its anchor with a restrained orange accent for primary actions.
keyCharacteristics: Clean, data-forward layouts with clear typographic hierarchy
Color-coded feedback (green success, red error, amber warning) consistent across the system
Responsive from mobile to desktop with a single 600px breakpoint

rules.name: The Three-Color Feedback Rule
rules.body: Success, error, and warning are the only semantic colors. They appear exclusively on badges, result labels, and status indicators.

rules.name: The No-Webfont Rule
rules.body: All text uses system fonts. Fast loading trumps typographic personality.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to hover and focus states.

dos: Do use the three feedback colors exclusively for semantic status.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; use shadows only for hover/focus feedback.
Do prefer system fonts over web fonts for fast loading.
Do use semantic <a> tags for navigation and <button> for actions.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) as a decorative default.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't put numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as decorative scaffolding.
Don't hard-code colors that have a corresponding design token.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing on animations.
